channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for techraptor.net

item.title: Dissidia Duellum Final Fantasy Release Date Revealed for Next Week
item.content:encoded:
Square Enix has announced the release date for upcoming arena fighter Dissidia Duellum Final Fantasy, which collects some of the most iconic characters from across the franchise and pits them against each other in boss battle races.

Per a new trailer, Dissidia Duellum Final Fantasy will launch on Android and iOS on March 24th. No release has been announced for PC or consoles, unfortunately, so you're gonna have to pull out your phone or tablet to play this one.

Dissidia Duellum Final Fantasy was first announced back in October, and despite the name, it's not actually a conventional Dissidia title; instead, it's a 3v3 arena fighter that sees two teams of characters competing with one another to be the first to take down a boss.

The game features redesigned versions of classic Final Fantasy characters like Final Fantasy IX's Zidane Tribal, Final Fantasy XV's Prompto Argentum, and Final Fantasy VII's iconic hero Cloud, among others.

Gameplay-wise, games see players hunting monsters near crystals in order to purify them and rack up the Bravery resource, which can then be used to damage bosses. You'll need to use everything at your disposal to beat bosses quicker than your rivals.

If you're a longtime Final Fantasy fan, you'll almost certainly get a kick out of identifying where many of Dissidia Duellum Final Fantasy's abilities come from; skills like Zidane's Grand Lethal, Rinoa's Angel Wing, and Minwu's Teleport all make an appearance.

You can check out the launch trailer for Dissidia Duellum Final Fantasy, which also gives you a glimpse into the way the game will play, right here.

Dissidia Duellum Final Fantasy's release date isn't the only Final Fantasy-related news to arrive this week; we also learned earlier today that Final Fantasy IX animated series Black Mages Legacy is back in production under French studio Eurovisual.

You can check out Dissidia Duellum Final Fantasy when it launches on Android and iOS on March 24th. Stay tuned for more.

Joe has been writing for TechRaptor for several years, and in those years has learned a lot about the gaming industry and its foibles. He’s originally an… More about Joseph
